item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: I’ll inspect the three schema/model/query files, make the scoped changes, then run the test suite against the configured database.

The account model currently persists arbitrary account data unchanged, while schema setup is delegated to the workspace’s existing enterprise generator. I’ll add enum validation at the model boundary, extend the schema setup with the accounts field validator, and project it in the summary.

item.aggregated_output:
npm notice run build-bench-mongo-schema-evolution-enterprise@1.0.0 test
npm notice run node tests/acceptance.test.mjs
Build-Bench enterprise acceptance passed: mongo

item.text:
Implemented the optional `preferredPaymentMethod` enum field and included it in order summaries.

Updated:
- `src/schema.mjs`
- `src/accounts.mjs`
- `src/queries.mjs`

Verified with `npm test` — acceptance suite passes.
